SEARCH
Package org.sim.food

Class Egg

java.lang.Object
org.sim.Entity
org.sim.food.Egg
public class Egg extends Entity
Represents a fish egg that can be fertilized by males and eventually hatches into a new fish.

    Mixes mother's genes with the father's genes, applies mutations, and activates the hatching process.

    Spawns a new fish into the simulation world using the finalized genetic combination.

    • Egg

      public Egg(processing.core.PVector position, Genes motherGenes, float timeTilHatch, float energy)
      Creates a new egg containing the mother's DNA.

  • Method Details

    • Update

      public void Update()
      Manages the egg timer logic, counting down to hatching or organic decay.
      Overrides:
      Update in class Entity

    • Fertilize

      public void Fertilize(Genes fatherGenes)
      Mixes mother's genes with the father's genes, applies mutations, and activates the hatching process. Called by father fish.

    • Hatch

      public void Hatch()
      Spawns a new fish into the simulation world using the finalized genetic combination.

    • Bite

      public float Bite(float plantToMeatDigestion, float damage)
      Handles the event when a starving fish bites or eats this egg. It instantly kills the egg and transfers its stored energy to the attacking fish.
      Overrides:
      Bite in class Entity
      Parameters:
      plantToMeatDigestion - The digestion efficiency coefficient of the attacker.
      damage - The amount of damage dealt to the egg.
      Returns:
      The amount of energy converted and returned to the attacker.
